atus.title: Product Management Routes
atus.description: Implement product management routes in routes_product.py: GET /products (list all products), POST /products (admin only, create product). RBAC: admin can create, user gets 403, no X-User-Id returns 401.

history.note: Developer 完成：实现了 GET /products 和 POST /products (admin only)，6/6 相关测试通过
Tester 全通过(4/4)，Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Order System + Model Changes
atus.description: 1) Add origin field (String, default='web') to Order model in models.py. 2) Implement order routes in routes_order.py: POST /orders (create order with stock deduction, origin support, atomic stock safety), GET /orders (admin sees all, user sees own). Must ensure stock never goes negative under concurrency.

history.note: Developer 完成：添加 origin 字段，实现订单路由（原子库存扣减用 SELECT FOR UPDATE），13/13 basic + 5/6 change 测试通过
Tester 全通过(13/13)，Reviewer 审查通过（原子库存、origin、RBAC 均正确）

atus.title: Rate Limiting Middleware
atus.description: Implement rate limiting in middleware.py: same user_id can only submit 1 order per 10 seconds. Exceeding returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests. Apply to POST /orders route in routes_order.py. Different users are not affected by each other's limits.

history.note: ATU-002 Done，依赖解除，委派 Developer
Developer 完成：添加限流功能（内存字典+10秒窗口），19/19 测试通过
Tester 全通过(2/2)，全部 19/19 测试通过无回归，Reviewer 审查通过
